name: openclaw-cohere-stt
description: OpenClaw Cohere audio transcription provider plugin

scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check README.md package.json openclaw.plugin.json index.ts audio.ts media-understanding-provider.ts audio.test.ts media-understanding-provider.test.ts readme.test.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.lint: oxlint index.ts audio.ts media-understanding-provider.ts audio.test.ts media-understanding-provider.test.ts readme.test.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
